creator: 4b88df56@nanoman.ca
text:
The FreeBSD port astro/google-earth has been marked as broken because of a checksum mismatch.  This started when Google Earth was updated to a new version and the distfile on the master site was replaced.

The maintainer is away on vacation and unavailable to update the port.

Fix: Apply the attached patch to update astro/google-earth to version 4.1.7076.4458.

Patch attached with submission follows:
